# minor-name negative corpus — should NOT trigger
# Adult names, company names, or names without age/child context
John Smith senior executive director
Sarah Johnson CEO of the company
Michael Brown manager at headquarters
The company president Emma Davis announced
Director Oliver Wilson attended the board meeting
Senior manager Isabella Thompson leads the team
Adult Noah Anderson age 35 executive
Organization president Charlotte Davis
Company director Liam Martinez
Senior executive Ava Thompson age 42
Emma Davis president of the organization
Oliver Brown adult manager position

Organization: Smith Foundation director
Michael adult 28 years old employee
Sarah senior manager corporation
